name: fix-hive-sql-parse-errors
title: 修复 Hive SQL 批量解析错误
description: Eliminate 77 success=false audit records when batch-parsing 931 Hive SQL files. Fix 1 (Hive dialect) was a runtime config change. Fix 2 (preprocess SET/ADD lines) was originally implemented as a Python script then upgraded into the Rust core via 05-14-port-hive-preprocess-to-core, where it became part of the canonical Hive dialect path.
creator: wangliang
notes:
Backfilled metadata. PRD asked for two fixes:
- Fix 1: restart server with --dialect hive — runtime operation, applied same day.
- Fix 2: preprocess SET / ADD FILE|JAR|ARCHIVE lines before sending to engine.

Fix 2 was first implemented in scripts/batch-parse-warehouse.py as a 13-step preprocessing pipeline. That script was later identified as an architectural anti-pattern (real /api/analyze callers got no benefit) and the entire pipeline was ported to Rust under follow-up task 05-14-port-hive-preprocess-to-core. The Rust port lives in crates/flowscope-core/src/hive_preprocess.rs and runs automatically when Dialect::Hive is selected.

Reference commit (the architectural upgrade that actually subsumes this task's Fix 2):
- d61a010 feat(core): port Hive SQL preprocessing into flowscope-core

Verification (post-port): full warehouse rerun reached 100% pass rate via the production /api/analyze path, exceeding the original PRD acceptance bar (success=0 ≤ 20, success=1 ≥ 95%).
